items.headline: India's Retail Inflation Hits 18-Month High, Surpassing RBI Target
items.summary: India's retail inflation (CPI) reached an 18-month high of 4.4% in June 2026, driven by increased food and fuel costs, surpassing the RBI's upper tolerance target. This surge suggests potential interest rate hikes in the latter half of FY27, with economists forecasting average CPI inflation of 5.1-5.2% for the fiscal year.

items.headline: RBI's Special Swap Facility Attracts Over $20.7 Billion in Forex Inflows
items.summary: The Reserve Bank of India's special swap facility has attracted over $20.7 billion in foreign exchange inflows by July 17, aimed at strengthening the balance of payments and incentivizing capital inflows.

items.headline: RBI to Conduct ₹75,000 Crore Variable Rate Repo Auction to Manage Liquidity
items.summary: The Reserve Bank of India is scheduled to conduct a 3-day Variable Rate Repo (VRR) auction for ₹75,000 crore on July 21, 2026, as part of its liquidity management operations.

items.headline: Government Clarifies No Proposal to Abolish Equity Long-Term Capital Gains Tax
items.summary: The government clarified on Monday that there is no proposal to abolish the Equity Long-Term Capital Gains (LTCG) tax.

items.headline: Revamped Index of Core Industries Unveiled with 2022-23 Base Year, Includes Iron Ore
items.summary: On July 20, the Office of Economic Adviser unveiled a revamped Index of Core Industries (ICI) with a new base year of 2022-23, now incorporating Iron Ore.

items.headline: Budget 2026: STT Hiked on F&O, Share Buybacks Taxed as Capital Gains, NRI Access Eased
items.summary: Budget 2026, presented in February, increased Securities Transaction Tax (STT) on futures and options, made share buybacks more tax-efficient for shareholders, and eased direct access for Non-Resident Indians/Persons of Indian Origin (NRI/PROI) to Indian stocks.

items.headline: US-Iran Tensions Escalate, Pushing Brent Crude Above $88/Barrel
items.summary: Global market sentiment remains cautious due to escalating US-Iran tensions in West Asia, which have pushed Brent crude oil prices above $88 per barrel, although mediation efforts are providing some relief.

items.headline: Asian Markets Mixed, US Equities Lower Overnight; GIFT Nifty Indicates Cautious Indian Open
items.summary: Asian markets are trading mixed today, while US equities closed lower overnight. The GIFT Nifty indicates a negative to cautious opening for Indian benchmark indices.

items.headline: FPIs Net Sellers, DIIs Net Buyers in Indian Equities on July 20
items.summary: Foreign Portfolio Investors (FPIs) were net sellers of Indian equities on July 20, selling shares worth ₹1,121.04 crore, while Domestic Institutional Investors (DIIs) were net buyers at ₹1,312.03 crore.

items.headline: Bajaj Auto, Indian Hotels, TVS Motor, Adani Energy Among Companies Announcing Q1 Results Today
items.summary: Key companies including Bajaj Auto, Indian Hotels Company, TVS Motor Company, Adani Energy Solutions, Adani Total Gas, Mahindra & Mahindra Financial Services, Bandhan Bank, CRISIL, Sagility, Mastek, and Cyient DLM are scheduled to release their Q1 FY27 earnings today.

items.headline: HDFC Bank Shares Tumble Over 5% on Disappointing Q1 Earnings
items.summary: HDFC Bank shares tumbled over 5% on Monday following weaker-than-expected Q1 earnings, specifically due to disappointing net interest margins.

items.headline: ICICI Bank Rises Nearly 3% Post Strong Q1 Earnings
items.summary: ICICI Bank shares rose nearly 3% after reporting a strong set of June-quarter earnings.

items.headline: Axis Bank, Kotak Mahindra Bank Under Pressure Due to Weak Q1 Net Interest Margins
items.summary: Both Axis Bank and Kotak Mahindra Bank experienced selling pressure due to weaker-than-expected net interest margins in their Q1 results.

items.headline: Paytm Reports Strong Q1 with 28% YoY Revenue Jump
items.summary: Paytm released strong June-quarter numbers, with revenue jumping 28% YoY and EBITDA zooming 182% YoY.

items.headline: Mahindra Logistics Q1 FY27 Consolidated Net Profit at ₹2.78 Billion
items.summary: Mahindra Logistics reported a consolidated net profit of ₹2.78 billion for Q1 FY27, compared to a net loss in the prior year.

items.headline: IDBI Bank Q1 FY27 Net Profit Rises 5.4% YoY to ₹21.15 Billion
items.summary: IDBI Bank saw a 5.4% YoY increase in standalone net profit to ₹21.15 billion in Q1 FY27.

items.headline: Nifty PSU Bank, Pharma, Healthcare, Media Sectors Outperform; Private Banks, IT Under Pressure
items.summary: On Monday, the Nifty PSU Bank, Pharma, Healthcare, and Media sectors outperformed, with PSU bank stocks rallying 2.8% after Punjab National Bank reported strong quarterly earnings. Conversely, Private Bank, Financial Services, Auto, and IT sectors remained under pressure. Metal and Oil & Gas sectors witnessed buying, while Realty and Banking sectors faced selling pressure.

items.headline: SBI Funds Management and Alpine Texworld to List on Exchanges Today
items.summary: SBI Funds Management, India's largest asset management company, and Alpine Texworld shares are scheduled for IPO listings on the NSE and BSE today.

items.headline: Cholamandalam Investment, Indo Borax & Chemicals Declare Dividends Today
items.summary: Cholamandalam Investment and Finance Company Ltd (Interim Dividend) and Indo Borax & Chemicals Ltd (Final Dividend) are distributing dividends today.

items.headline: Pondy Oxides & Chemicals Ltd Announces Stock Split
items.summary: Pondy Oxides & Chem Ltd will undergo a stock split from a face value of ₹5 to ₹2.

items.headline: India's H1 2026 M&A Activity Sees 21.7% Value Increase
items.summary: India's M&A activity in H1 2026 saw a 21.7% increase in value, marking the second-highest January-June period on record, though deal volumes declined.

items.headline: Torrent Pharma-J.B. Chemicals Merger Leads to Nifty Index Reshuffle
items.summary: The merger of Torrent Pharmaceuticals and J.B. Chemicals & Pharmaceuticals, approved by the Index Maintenance Sub-Committee (Equity), has led to a comprehensive reshuffle across various Nifty indices, effective from the close of July 16, 2026.

items.headline: Analysts Expect ICICI Bank, TCS, Sun Pharma to Remain Favored
items.summary: Univest analysts Ankit Jaiswal and Kunal Singla highlighted ICICI Bank, TCS, and Sun Pharma as top stocks to watch, expecting them to stay favored in the market.

items.headline: HDFC Bank, Axis Bank Expected to Grapple with Q1 Results Reaction
items.summary: HDFC Bank and Axis Bank are anticipated to continue reacting to their weaker-than-expected Q1 earnings, particularly concerning net interest margins.

streetRecommendations.name: JSW Energy
streetRecommendations.rationale: Strong resurgence near 100-day and 200-day EMA, bullish engulfing candle.

streetRecommendations.name: Bajaj Healthcare
streetRecommendations.rationale: Higher-high, higher-low structure, decisive close above 200-day EMA.

streetRecommendations.name: Bank of India Ltd
streetRecommendations.rationale: Buy in the range of ₹146–₹147; Stop Loss at ₹141.30;

streetRecommendations.name: Computer Age Management Services
streetRecommendations.rationale: Buy in the range of ₹770–₹771; Stop Loss at ₹740;

streetRecommendations.name: Bharti Airtel
streetRecommendations.rationale: Buy in the range of ₹1939–₹1940; Stop Loss at ₹1837;
